title: Pi is INCREDIBLE - Building a Custom Coding Agent Live
summary: Pi is a minimalist coding agent with a tiny core supporting read, write, edit, and bash operations, designed to be extended via npm and git packages. It can integrate with various models including Kimi K2.6, MiniMax M2.7, and Qwen 3.6, providing an alternative to frontier models with strict rate limits.
